name: Wir Wir Kiwir Icikiwir
lore:
Lore of Wir Wir Kiwir Icikiwir
                                    


The original story is a stage dance cut from the Indonesian dangdut song "Kewer-Kewer (Libertaria feat. Riris Arista)". A video of Citra Marcelina swaying her hips and singing "wir wir kiwir icikiwir" has become an addictive soundtrack that has been abused in looping videos on TikTok and Roblox's Steal A Brainrot. Her bright costumes and constant hip movements are popular as a symbol of "unstoppable brain rot."
